content: Algorithm  Construction Phase:  Select two random large primes $p$, and $q$. Calculate $N=pq$ and $\phi(N)=(p-1)(q-1)$. Pick an encryption key $e$ that is coprime with $\phi(N)$. Calculate the decryption key $d$ such that $$de\equiv 1\pmod{\phi(N)}.$$   Operation Phase:  Make the public key $(N, e)$ public, and keep $p$, $q$ and $d$ as secrets. Sender encrypts its message $M$ as $$E(M)=M^e\pmod{N}.$$ Receiver decrypts it by calculating $$E(M)^d=M^{ed}\equiv M\pmod{N}.$$
title: RSA encryption scheme

content:
Notes about settings of my dwm, dwmblocks, …
Using emoji in the status bar   Install libxft-bgra in AUR:
Use yay to install package from AUR: yay -S libxft-bgra. If a gpg key problem occured, just try install libxft-bgra-git package instead.
  Change some code in drw.c of dmenu and dwm:
Search color fonts in those file. Find a block comment like this.
/* Do not allow using color fonts. This is a workaround for a BadLength ...  Just comment out the if block right after the comment.
Note that some fonts can crash dwm if this step was not done. Details in ArchWiki.
  Change the font used in status bar of dwm
Select a font that support emoji, like Noto Color Emoji.
  Restart dwm
The default shortcut to terminate dwm is Alt+Shift+Backspace.
title: Settings Related to Dwm
